userStories.title: Habit streak entity, repository, and schema migration
userStories.notes: wt_habit_logs migration, HabitEntity, HabitLogEntity, HabitRepository with streak calculation.

userStories.title: Habit tracker screen with streak display and milestones
userStories.notes: Habits screen with 30-day dot grid, fire streak badge, milestone celebrations at 7/30/90/180.

userStories.title: Kegel protocol with guided timer
userStories.notes: 3 protocols (Quick Flicks, Long Holds, Reverse Kegels), phase transitions, vibration, auto-log.

userStories.title: Supplements screen completion (add/edit dialogs)
userStories.notes: All 4 TODO stubs replaced with Material 3 bottom sheets.

userStories.title: Bloodwork log entity, repository, and input screen
userStories.notes: 12 pre-loaded test types, 4 categories, color-coded results, add/edit flow.

userStories.title: Bloodwork trend charts and out-of-range alerts on dashboard
userStories.notes: FL Chart detail screen with reference range band, dashboard summary card.

userStories.title: Daily View integration with habits section
userStories.notes: Habits in daily checklist, auto-complete for steps/sleep, kegel quick-link, aggregate task counting.

userStories.title: AI bloodwork interpretation (suggestive only)
userStories.notes: Consent-gated, deterministic fallback, medical disclaimer, labelled as suggestion.
